type.description: Defines the type of a project

targetVersion.description: The Minecraft version this project targets (e.g., "1.17.0" or "1.16.220")

experimentalGameplay.description: Experimental gameplay the project intends to use. Maps strings to experimental gameplay toggles.

namespace.description: The namespace used for the project. The namespace "minecraft" is not a valid string for this field.

packs.description: Maps the id of packs this project contains to a path relative to the config.json

worlds.description: Defines a list of glob patterns pointing to folders storing Minecraft worlds. Glob patterns may not end with "**" to avoid ambiguity.

packDefinitions.description: Allows users to define additional data which is hard to find for tools (e.g. scoreboards setup inside of a world)

logo.description: Path to an image (relative to the project root) that serves as an icon for this author. Tools should support ".png" & ".jpg" images

type.description: Optional: Define e.g. the type of a scoreboard objective

exclude.description: Strings to exclude from a tool's collected data

include.description: String to add to a tool's collected data
